name: Mexican Refried Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Place olive oil and garlic in a 9-inch microwave-safe pie plate. Microwave on HIGH (100% power) for 45 seconds.
2. Drain the pinto beans, reserving about one-third cup of juice.
3. Add the beans and reserved juices to the garlic mixture in the pie plate. Mash the beans with a potato masher until all are broken up.
4. Stir in the black pepper.
5. Cover with wax paper and microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes.
6. Stir well and smooth out the top to make it even. Makes 2 cups.
